member.name: T:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule
member.summary: Primary Everest module entry point for Desolo Zantas. Coordinates chapter registration, hook installation, credits routing, shared resources, and high-level runtime state.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule.#ctor
member.summary: Create the module singleton for the MaggyHelper assembly.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule.Load
member.summary: Register the Desolo Zantas runtime systems, including area integration, side extension hooks, and custom cutscene helpers.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule.Unload
member.summary: Remove the hooks and transient state installed by the module.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule.LoadContent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Load assembly content and forward content initialization to supporting gameplay modules.
member.param: Whether this is the first content load for the current process.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule.IsChapter17EpilogueCompleted
member.summary: Check whether the Chapter 17 epilogue has been marked complete in module save data.
member.returns: when the save data records the epilogue as complete.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule.MarkChapter17EpilogueCompleted
member.summary: Mark the Chapter 17 epilogue complete and clear the related credits state in the current module session.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule.LaunchChapter17Epilogue
member.summary: Launch the Chapter 17 epilogue area directly from module-controlled state.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule.IsMaggyPlayerAvailable
member.summary: Probe whether the optional Maggy player type is available for reflection-based integrations.
member.returns: when the player type can be resolved.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule.GetMaggyPlayerType
member.summary: Resolve the runtime type for the optional Maggy player implementation.
member.returns: The player type when available; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModule.LaunchCredits(Celeste.Session)
member.summary: Start the Chapter 17 credits sequence from a session and redirect the player into the dedicated credits room.
member.param: Source session used to seed the credits transition.

member.name: T:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModuleSaveData
member.summary: Persistent save store for Desolo Zantas. Tracks intro flow, custom unlocks, achievements, heart gems, soul fragments, chapter completion, and boss completion.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModuleSaveData.CollectHeartGem(System.String)
member.summary: Record a custom Desolo Zantas heart gem as collected.
member.param: Unique heart-gem id, typically derived from SID and mode.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModuleSaveData.HasCollectedHeartGem(System.String)
member.summary: Check whether a custom Desolo Zantas heart gem has already been collected.
member.returns: when the save contains that gem id.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModuleSaveData.CollectSoulFragment(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Record a soul fragment pickup and increment the associated barrier-progress bucket.
member.param: Barrier bucket that should receive progress.
member.returns: when the fragment was newly collected.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModuleSaveData.RecordBossDefeat(System.String)
member.summary: Record a defeated boss and increment the persistent total-boss counter.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModuleSaveData.CompleteChapter(System.String)
member.summary: Mark a chapter SID as complete in persistent save data.

member.name: M:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModuleSaveData.IsChapterCompleted(System.String)
member.summary: Check whether a chapter SID has already been marked complete.
member.returns: when the chapter has been recorded as complete.

member.name: T:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModuleSession
member.summary: Per-session runtime state for Desolo Zantas, including boss-fight status, Kirby state, and the current credits phase.

member.name: T:Celeste.Mod.MaggyHelper.MaggyHelperModuleSettings
member.summary: User-facing MaggyHelper settings such as boss difficulty, Kirby-player toggles, debug mode, and intro-skip behavior.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.AreaMapData
member.summary: Vanilla-style chapter registry used by Desolo Zantas. Defines chapter metadata, side support, audio, and mountain-camera data used by runtime area integration.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.AreaMapData+ChapterDef
member.summary: Metadata record for one registered Desolo Zantas chapter.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.AreaMapData+MountainCameraData
member.summary: Overworld camera preset bundle for one registered Desolo Zantas chapter.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaMapData.Initialize
member.summary: Register the Desolo Zantas chapter table in code.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaMapData.RefreshAvailableSides
member.summary: Refresh which sides are available for each registered chapter based on the current map set.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaMapData.FindByAnySID(System.String)
member.summary: Resolve a registered chapter from any supported SID variant.
member.returns: The matching chapter definition, or when none matches.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaMapData.Load
member.summary: Install the hooks required for the chapter registry to participate in runtime area loading.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaMapData.Unload
member.summary: Remove hooks installed by the chapter registry.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.AreaModeExtender
member.summary: Core Desolo Zantas area extension layer. Builds side SIDs, extends chapters beyond vanilla A/B/C, and synchronizes custom side progression with save data.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaModeExtender.GetSideFolder(System.Int32)
member.summary: Return the folder name used for a side index.
member.returns: The folder segment used to build a side SID.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaModeExtender.BuildSideSID(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Build a Desolo Zantas map SID from a side index and map basename.
member.returns: A side-specific SID rooted at the internal Maggy prefix.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaModeExtender.BuildSideSID(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Build a Desolo Zantas map SID from a side-folder name and map basename.
member.param: Folder name such as ASide or DXSide.
member.returns: A side-specific SID.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaModeExtender.BuildASideSID(System.String)
member.summary: Convenience helper for building an A-Side SID.
member.returns: An A-Side SID.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaModeExtender.Load
member.summary: Install runtime hooks used by side handling, save synchronization, and heart-gem tracking.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaModeExtender.Unload
member.summary: Remove the runtime hooks installed by the side-extension layer.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaModeExtender.GetModeName(System.Int32)
member.summary: Return the internal mode label used in Desolo Zantas save keys.
member.returns: The internal mode label.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.AreaModeExtender.IsSideUnlocked(Celeste.AreaKey,System.Int32)
member.summary: Check whether a side is available to the current save.
member.returns: when the side should be selectable.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.PostcardUnlockSystem
member.summary: Handles Desolo Zantas unlock postcards for C-Side, D-Side, DX-side, and ultra-completion milestones.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.PostcardUnlockSystem+PostcardConfig
member.summary: Data container for one postcard variant, including dialog key, texture, sounds, tint, and unlock music.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.PostcardUnlockSystem.GetUnlockConfig(System.Int32)
member.summary: Return the postcard configuration associated with a completed side.
member.param: Side index that was just finished.
member.returns: The matching postcard configuration, or when none applies.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.PostcardUnlockSystem.ShowUnlockPostcard(Monocle.Scene,Celeste.Session,System.Int32)
member.summary: Show a side-unlock postcard and mark the next side as unlocked in custom save data.
member.param: Side index that was just finished.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.PostcardUnlockSystem.ShowUltraCompletionPostcard(Monocle.Scene)
member.summary: Show the postcard used for the ultra-completion milestone.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.SideUnlockVignette
member.summary: Transition scene that displays a side-unlock postcard and then returns the player to the overworld.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.SideLockDisplaySystem
member.summary: Optional chapter-panel UI helper for Desolo Zantas side availability. Provides lock overlays, reasons, progress text, and blocked selection behavior.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.SideLockDisplaySystem+LockDisplayConfig
member.summary: Configuration record for one lockable side tab.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.SideLockDisplaySystem.GetLockReason(Celeste.AreaKey,System.Int32)
member.summary: Return a player-facing explanation for why a side is locked.
member.returns: A requirement string, or when the side is available.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.SideLockDisplaySystem.GetUnlockProgress(Celeste.AreaKey,System.Int32)
member.summary: Return progress text for a locked side.
member.returns: A progress string, or when not needed.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.SideLockDisplaySystem.ShouldGreyOut(Celeste.AreaKey,System.Int32)
member.summary: Check whether a side tab should render as unavailable.
member.returns: when the tab should be greyed out.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.SideLockDisplaySystem.TrySelectSide(Celeste.AreaKey,System.Int32)
member.summary: Attempt to select a side from chapter UI.
member.returns: when selection may continue.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.UI.ModSelectionScreen
member.summary: First-launch Desolo Zantas title overlay that lets the player choose between the mod intro flow and the normal Celeste front end.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.UI.ModSelectionScreen.#ctor
member.summary: Create the one-time Desolo Zantas mod selection screen.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.Entities.SubMapLobby
member.summary: Lobby interaction entity used by later-game chapters to expose submaps, EX routes, and boss routes from a shared hub.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Entities.SubMapLobby.#ctor(Microsoft.Xna.Framework.Vector2,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a submap lobby anchor for a specific chapter.
member.param: World position of the lobby interaction entity.
Chapter number whose submaps should be exposed.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.Entities.SubMapManager
member.summary: Persistent hub-progression controller for the lobby chapters. Tracks submap unlocks, transition destinations, and route progression for chapters 10 through 14.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Entities.SubMapManager.#ctor
member.summary: Create the global submap manager and initialize its registry.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Entities.SubMapManager.CanEnterSubmap(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Check whether a submap route is currently unlocked.
member.returns: when the route can be entered.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Entities.SubMapManager.EnterSubmap(Celeste.Level,Celeste.Player,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Store return data and transition the player into a specific submap room.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Entities.SubMapManager.ReturnToLobby(Celeste.Level,Celeste.Player)
member.summary: Return the player from a submap to the recorded lobby room and respawn position.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Entities.SubMapManager.GetChapterSubmaps(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve the registered submap records for one chapter.
member.returns: A list of submap descriptors for that chapter.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Entities.SubMapManager.GetCollectedHeartGems(Celeste.Level,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Count heart-gem style collectibles tracked for a specific submap.
member.param: Level whose session flags should be inspected.
member.returns: The number of collected gems detected for that route.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.Entities.SubMapData
member.summary: Runtime record describing one submap route, including map path, unlock flag, completion flag, required heart gems, and current unlock status.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.Triggers.SubMapLobbyTrigger
member.summary: Trigger that transfers the player from a main chapter into that chapter's lobby map once the required completion flag is present.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Triggers.SubMapLobbyTrigger.OnEnter(Celeste.Player)
member.summary: Validate the main-chapter requirement and queue the lobby transition.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.Triggers.SubMapReturnTrigger
member.summary: Trigger that returns the player from a submap to a configured room or to the lobby flow managed by the submap manager.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Triggers.SubMapReturnTrigger.OnEnter(Celeste.Player)
member.summary: Queue a return from a submap to its destination room or lobby handler.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.Triggers.SubMapEnterTrigger
member.summary: Trigger that enters a specific submap directly, optionally enforcing unlock rules first.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Triggers.SubMapEnterTrigger.OnEnter(Celeste.Player)
member.summary: Attempt to enter a configured submap and show the locked message when the route is unavailable.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.Cutscenes.CS17_Credits
member.summary: Large-scale Chapter 17 credits cutscene. Drives the credits-room sequence, camera choreography, follower handling, and transition into the epilogue when needed.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Cutscenes.CS17_Credits.#ctor
member.summary: Create the Chapter 17 credits cutscene and disable conflicting player-input helpers for the duration of the sequence.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.Cutscenes.CS21_EpilogueCredits
member.summary: Post-epilogue credits sequence that mixes memory cards and developer credits after the final story content.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Cutscenes.CS21_EpilogueCredits.#ctor(Celeste.Player)
member.summary: Create the post-epilogue credits sequence around a specific player instance.
member.param: Player to anchor during the sequence.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.Entities.AxisTerminatorBoss
member.summary: Heavy robotic boss encounter that mixes machine-gun fire, rockets, laser targeting, electric pulses, and charge attacks.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Entities.AxisTerminatorBoss.#ctor(Celeste.EntityData,Microsoft.Xna.Framework.Vector2)
member.summary: Construct the Axis Terminator boss from map entity data and room offset.
member.param: Room offset applied during entity loading.

member.name: T:MaggyHelper.Entities.AsrielGodBoss
member.summary: Multi-phase final boss used by Desolo Zantas finale content. Combines node-based movement, scripted attack sequences, projectile patterns, camera locking, dialogue beats, and phase transitions.

member.name: M:MaggyHelper.Entities.AsrielGodBoss.#ctor(Celeste.EntityData,Microsoft.Xna.Framework.Vector2)
member.summary: Construct the Asriel God boss from map entity data, including optional custom attack-sequence metadata.
member.param: Room offset applied during entity loading.
